content:
📜 Once a student selects a familiar, it remains bound to their character permanently.

✔ Final Familiar Rules:
• Familiars cannot be traded, dismissed, or replaced.
• They evolve with the character but their core function remains unchanged.
• Only one familiar per student, reinforcing its role as a guiding force.

✔ Why This Works:
✔ Prevents abuse of swapping buffs.
✔ Encourages deeper attachment to chosen familiars.
✔ Aligns with literary and mythological themes of soul-bound companions.

📜 2. Character Alteration Ritual – A One-Time, High-Stakes Choice

📜 Players can alter fundamental aspects of their character only once, by performing a sacrificial ritual.

✔ How the Ritual Works:
